name: ink-density-meter
title: Ink Density Meter
description: Risograph-style Ink Density Meter component with ink misregistration effects. Supports named theme presets and per-instance color overrides.
docs: Use the theme prop for named presets: theme="blue-pink". Use primary/secondary/overlap/paper props for raw color overrides. Set data-riso-theme on a parent element for section-level theming.
